data.title: Can ChatGPT-powered AI agents really trade crypto for you?
data.description:
Key takeawaysChatGPT-powered AI agents automate trading tasks using natural language prompts and API integrations, improving speed and consistency. Successes occur when ChatGPT is used as a support tool, not a fully autonomous trading system. Failures happen when traders over-rely on ChatGPT without real-time data, proper risk management or manual oversight. Regulatory focus on AI in trading is increasing, with new frameworks emerging to ensure transparency, accountability and compliance
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/can-chatgpt-powered-ai-agents-really-trade-crypto-for-you?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Volatility Shares to Launch First XRP Futures ETF on Nasdaq Today
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Volatility Shares will launch the first XRP futures ETF (XRPI) on Nasdaq today, which will invest at least 80% of its net assets in XRP-related financial instruments. The company also plans to launch a 2x leveraged XRP futures ETF product. Previously, the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) launched XRP futures and micro XRP futures contracts on May 19, providing institutional investors with a regulatory channel to access XRP. Analysts expect that under the more friendly regulatory attitude of the new SEC Chairman Paul Atkins, the spot XRP ETF is expected to be approved later this year, with a market expectation probability of 83%.

data.title: KuCoin Pay and AEON Collaborate to Mainstream Web3 Payments Across Asia
data.description:
In a bid to simplify mobile crypto payments for both online and retail shoppers in the fast-growing digital markets across Asia, KuCoin Pay, KuCoin’s crypto payment solution, announced its partnership with AEON, a prominent Web3 payment protocol. The collaboration was made public on 21 May 2025 and aims to leverage KuCoin Pay’s global network with.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/kucoin-pay-and-aeon-collaborate-to-mainstream-web3-payments-across-asia/

data.title: Bitget Wallet releases its product roadmap after brand upgrade: focusing on four major scenarios: "trading, financial management, payment, and exploration"
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet announced the completion of a comprehensive brand upgrade and released a new product roadmap, focusing on the four core scenarios of "trading, financial management, payment, and exploration", and continued to promote the implementation of the "Crypto for Everyone" vision.
Smarter trading: Discover opportunities through the Alpha module, combine Hot Picks, market conditions, K-line and AI analysis to make quick judgments, and complete transactions with one click. Support 130+ public chains, built-in MEV protection, slippage optimization and novice-friendly GetGas function, lower the operating threshold, and make the transaction process efficient and secure.
Easier financial management: Integrate mainstream DeFi protocols, support one-click financial management and automatic income strategies. The new function Hold2Earn realizes "holding coins means earning interest", and will launch a native income vault in the future to realize automatic interest calculation and withdrawal of vault balance, further lowering the threshold for financial management.
Payment is more daily: Supports three methods: code scanning, card swiping, and mall consumption, allowing users to use crypto assets to purchase 300+ brand products, or pay at offline merchants through Paydify and Solana Pay; Bitget Wallet Visa card has been launched in many countries in Asia.
Exploration is simpler: Aggregate DApp, airdrops, interactive tasks and on-chain tools, including testnet faucets, SOL rental refunds, etc. Supports registration without mnemonics and multiple security protections to help new users explore the Web3 world more safely and easily.
Bitget Wallet said that it will continue to innovate products and services in the future to make Crypto truly part of life.

data.title: Veteran trader predicts Bitcoin price for August 2025
data.description:
Veteran trader Peter Brandt has projected that with Bitcoin (BTC) hitting a new all-time high, the asset’s technical setup is likely positioning it for a rally of up to 35% in August. Brandt, who boasts over four decades of trading experience, suggested that the current formation could see the leading cryptocurrency trading at $125,000, or even $150,000, this August, according to his X post on May 21. Bitcoin price analysis chart. Source: Peter Brandt His analysis highlighted Bitcoin’s breakout from a bull flag pattern after retesting the $102,400 level
source: https://finbold.com/veteran-trader-predicts-bitcoin-price-for-august-2025/
